creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update games/gtkballs port.


diff -Nru gtkballs/patches/patch-aa gtkballs-1.02/patches/patch-aa
--- gtkballs/patches/patch-aa	Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
+++ gtkballs-1.02/patches/patch-aa	Mon Dec 28 14:53:42 1998
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- makefile	Sun Nov 15 09:37:57 1998
++++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/makefile	Mon Dec 28 14:53:05 1998
+@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
+ #
+ # Installation prefix
+ #
+-PREFIX=/usr/local
++PREFIX?=/usr/local
+ 
+ #
+ # C options

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
